channel.title: Emmerican Adventure
channel.description: A Navy family trading Jacksonville, FL for Yokosuka, Japan — honest stories about the PCS journey and life abroad.

item.title: Jacksonville Flavors: Mastering the DIY Grill and Boil
item.description: As we inch closer to our move to Japan, the preparation process has been all-consuming. While I recently wrote about using hot pot as a way…

item.title: Prepping for Our Big Adventure: A Taste of Asia Right Here in Jacksonville!
item.description: With our upcoming Permanent Change of Station to Yokosuka, Japan, coming up fast in August, the whole Emmer family is getting into the…

item.title: Hoops and Highlights: A Week at the NAS Jax Youth Activities Center
item.description: Last week was an action-packed one for the kids, as they spent their days on base at the NAS Jax Youth Activities Center. It was a…

item.title: Preparing for Japan: Charley’s Big Vet Day!
item.description: Preparing for Japan: Charley’s Big Vet Day! It is officially crunch time for our international move! As many of you know, bringing a dog to…

item.title: Summer Fun at the NAS Jax Pool!
item.description: We had an absolute blast at the NAS Jacksonville MWR pool this week! There is no better way to beat the Florida heat than spending the day…

item.title: From Jacksonville to Japan: Mastering Golden Curry at Home
item.description: There’s something incredibly comforting about a warm, hearty bowl of Japanese curry. It’s been a staple in our house for a while now—thanks…

item.title: Tacos, Travels, and Tokyo Dreams: A Tampa Farewell
item.description: As July creeps closer and the reality of our upcoming move to Yokosuka sets in, the endless checklists and packing logistics give way to one last Tampa road trip with good friends.

item.title: Decluttering, Diamond Dirt, and Dinner: The PCS Countdown Continues
item.description: The countdown to Japan is officially in double digits, and our days are flying by in a blur of packing tape, baseball dirt, and savory…

item.title: PCS Chronicles: The Medical Milestone
item.description: Another day, another step in the PCS checklist. If you’ve ever moved for the military, you know the process is less of a smooth transition…

item.title: Chasing Dreams Under the Wings of Legends: A Day at NAS Jax
item.description: There’s a unique kind of magic in the air at Naval Air Station Jacksonville. It’s more than just the hum of jet engines or the steady…

item.title: Training My Palate: A Pre-Departure Hot Pot Feast
item.description: What better way to prep for life in Asia than with a comforting, communal meal of Korean hot pot?

item.title: Packing Up for Japan: The Purge Begins!
item.description: The purge has officially begun. If it doesn't fit in a suitcase or ship cheaply, it's gone.
